mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_plan (user_id, plan_title, total_calorie, plan_content, version_no, parent_plan_id, generate_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{planTitle}, #{totalCalorie}, #{planContent}, #{versionNo}, #{parentPlanId}, #{generateTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY generate_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY generate_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM ai_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_plan SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE ai_plan SET plan_title = #{planTitle}, total_calorie = #{totalCalorie}, plan_content = #{planContent}, version_no = #{versionNo}, parent_plan_id = #{parentPlanId}, generate_time = #{generateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY generate_time DESC LIMIT 1
